message:
fix(release): add v prefix to version in goreleaser ldflags

The goreleaser config was embedding the version without the 'v' prefix
(e.g., "0.14.4" instead of "v0.14.4"), inconsistent with the default
value in pkg/version/version.go.

This caused binaries built by goreleaser to display "bv 0.14.4" instead
of the expected "bv v0.14.4".

Closes #97

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ builds:
     binary: bv
     ldflags:
       - -s -w
-      - -X github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/version.Version={{.Version}}
+      - -X github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/pkg/version.Version=v{{.Version}}
     goos:
       - linux
       - darwin
